Casino lobbies are often busy before the player even starts: reels, symbols, side bets, bonus buttons and flashing panels compete for attention. Ice Fishing feels different because Evolution builds the game around a colder, calmer idea: frozen water, fishing holes, a host, and the pause before the catch is revealed.

Lobi za kasino mara nyingi huwa na shughuli nyingi kabla hata mchezaji hajaanza: reels, alama, dau za upande, vitufe vya bonasi na paneli zinazometa zinashindana kwa umakini. Ice Fishing inahisi tofauti kwa sababu Evolution inajenga mchezo kuzunguka wazo la baridi na utulivu: maji yaliyoganda, mashimo ya uvuvi, mwenyeji, na pause kabla ya uvuvi kufichuliwa.

The game still has the pace of a modern live casino show, but the mood is quieter than many high-energy titles. The tension comes from the wheel, the bonus trigger and the fishing reveal, not from a screen overloaded with effects.

Mchezo bado una mwendo wa onyesho la kasino la kisasa, lakini hali ni tulivu kuliko majina mengi yenye nishati nyingi. Mvutano unatoka kwa gurudumu, kichocheo cha bonasi na kufichuliwa kwa uvuvi, si skrini iliyojaa athari.
This page explains how Ice Fishing works, what the demo can and cannot teach, how betting options differ, why mobile play suits the format, and what to check before trying real-money rounds.

Ukurasa huu unaeleza jinsi Ice Fishing inavyofanya kazi, kile demo inaweza na haiwezi kufundisha, jinsi chaguo za kuweka dau zinatofautiana, kwa nini mchezo wa simu unafaa muundo, na nini cha kuangalia kabla ya kujaribu raundi za pesa halisi.

Ice Fishing by Evolution is a speed game show built around a 53-segment money wheel and three fishing-style Bonus games. It is not a table game and not a slot, even though it borrows the instant clarity of a wheel game.

Ice Fishing kutoka Evolution ni onyesho la kasino la kasi lililojengwa kuzunguka gurudumu la pesa la sehemu 53 na michezo mitatu ya Bonasi ya mtindo wa uvuvi. Si mchezo wa meza wala slot, ingawa inachukua uwazi wa papo hapo wa mchezo wa gurudumu.

The main round asks players to choose where the wheel will stop. Some segments settle the payout immediately, while others open a Bonus game in an Arctic scene where fish carry different multiplier values.

Raundi kuu inaomba wachezaji kuchagua gurudumu litasimama wapi. Sehemu zingine hulipa malipo mara moja, huku zingine zikifungua mchezo wa Bonasi katika mandhari ya Arctic ambapo samaki hubeba thamani tofauti za multiplier.

The basic instant-win options are Leaf 1 and Leaf 2. The bonus side is built around Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges and Huge Reds. There is also an All Bonuses option for players who want to cover every bonus segment together.

Chaguo za msingi za ushindi wa papo hapo ni Leaf 1 na Leaf 2. Upande wa bonasi umejengwa kuzunguka Lil' Blues, Big Oranges na Huge Reds. Pia kuna chaguo la All Bonuses kwa wachezaji wanaotaka kufunika kila sehemu ya bonasi pamoja.
Before the wheel spins, random multipliers can appear on Leaf or Bonus segments. A bonus multiplier matters because it can raise values inside the fishing reveal, not only the first wheel result.

Kabla gurudumu halijazunguka, multipliers za nasibu zinaweza kuonekana kwenye sehemu za Leaf au Bonasi. Multiplier ya bonasi ni muhimu kwa sababu inaweza kuongeza thamani ndani ya kufichuliwa kwa uvuvi, si tu matokeo ya kwanza ya gurudumu.

The ranges are easy to read: Lil’ Blues is the lighter bonus, Big Oranges sits in the middle, and Huge Reds carries the biggest possible rewards. That simple ladder makes the game clear even for a new player.
Masafa ni rahisi kusoma: Lil' Blues ni bonasi nyepesi, Big Oranges iko katikati, na Huge Reds hubeba zawadi kubwa zinazowezekana. Ngazi hiyo rahisi inafanya mchezo uwe wazi hata kwa mchezaji mpya.

A round starts before the wheel spins. The player chooses a stake and selects one or more bet spots. The timer closes, the host starts the wheel, and the result determines whether the round ends instantly or moves into a Bonus game.

Raundi huanza kabla gurudumu halijazunguka. Mchezaji huchagua dau na kuchagua sehemu moja au zaidi za dau. Kipima muda kinafungwa, mwenyeji anaanzisha gurudumu, na matokeo huamua kama raundi inaisha mara moja au inaendelea kwenye mchezo wa Bonasi.

If the wheel lands on Leaf 1 or Leaf 2, the result is settled right away. If it lands on Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges or Huge Reds, the game moves into the fishing reveal where the final multiplier is shown through the catch.

Ikiwa gurudumu linaangukia Leaf 1 au Leaf 2, matokeo hulipwa mara moja. Ikiwa linaangukia Lil' Blues, Big Oranges au Huge Reds, mchezo unaendelea kwenye kufichuliwa kwa uvuvi ambapo multiplier ya mwisho inaonyeshwa kupitia uvuvi.

Only players who placed the matching bet take part in that Bonus result. Everyone can watch the reveal, but the win applies only to the relevant bet. This keeps the round easy to follow without removing the suspense.

Wachezaji walioweka dau linalolingana tu ndio wanaoshiriki matokeo hiyo ya Bonasi. Kila mtu anaweza kuangalia kufichuliwa, lakini ushindi unatumika tu kwa dau linalofaa. Hii inafanya raundi iwe rahisi kufuatilia bila kuondoa mvutano.

The format is quick, but the reveal slows the moment down just enough to create tension. That is the main difference from a normal spin: the outcome is not simply displayed, it is staged through the live-show theme.

Muundo ni wa haraka, lakini kufichuliwa kunapunguza kasi kwa muda wa kutosha kuunda mvutano. Hiyo ndiyo tofauti kuu na spin ya kawaida: matokeo hayajaonyeshwa tu, yanahalilishwa kupitia mandhari ya onyesho la moja kwa moja.
For responsible play, the important point is simple: every bet is still a gambling decision. The theme is calm, but the result is chance-based and real-money play can lead to losses.
Kwa mchezo wenye uwajibikaji, jambo muhimu ni rahisi: kila dau bado ni uamuzi wa kamari. Mandhari ni tulivu, lakini matokeo yanategemea bahati na mchezo wa pesa halisi unaweza kusababisha hasara.

Ice Fish Demo is useful for practice, but it should not be confused with the original Ice Fishing Live table from Evolution. Live studio games do not behave like ordinary slot demos because they depend on a real host and scheduled live rounds.

Ice Fish Demo ni muhimu kwa mazoezi, lakini haipaswi kuchanganywa na meza halisi ya Ice Fishing Live kutoka Evolution. Michezo ya studio ya moja kwa moja haifanyi kama demo za slot za kawaida kwa sababu inategemea mwenyeji halisi na raundi za moja kwa moja zilizopangwa.
For practice, a demo-style Ice Fish game helps players understand similar logic: choose an outcome, wait for the result, and see how the payout reacts. It is a learning tool, not a prediction tool.

Kwa mazoezi, mchezo wa Ice Fish wa mtindo wa demo husaidia wachezaji kuelewa mantiki inayofanana: chagua matokeo, subiri matokeo, na uone jinsi malipo yanavyoitikia. Ni zana ya kujifunza, si zana ya utabiri.
There is no deposit in demo mode. The balance is virtual, so players can try different choices, follow the rhythm and learn the interface without risking money.
Hakuna amana katika hali ya demo. Salio ni la kawaida, hivyo wachezaji wanaweza kujaribu chaguo tofauti, kufuata mwendo na kujifunza kiolesura bila kuhatarisha pesa.

The demo does not replace the Evolution studio experience, but it helps before real-money play because the player learns timing, bet placement and the discipline of stopping when the session limit is reached.

Demo haichukui nafasi ya uzoefu wa studio wa Evolution, lakini husaidia kabla ya mchezo wa pesa halisi kwa sababu mchezaji hujifunza timing, uwekaji wa dau na nidhamu ya kusimama kikomo cha kikao kinapofikiwa.

Ice Fishing has more flexibility than a basic wheel title because players are not locked into one outcome type. They can choose instant Leaf results, individual Bonus games, or broader bonus coverage.

Ice Fishing ina unyumbufu zaidi kuliko kichwa cha gurudumu cha msingi kwa sababu wachezaji hawafungwi kwenye aina moja ya matokeo. Wanaweza kuchagua matokeo ya Leaf ya papo hapo, michezo ya Bonasi ya kibinafsi, au ufunikaji mpana wa bonasi.
Leaf 1 and Leaf 2 are the more direct options. They settle immediately if the wheel lands there, which suits players who prefer simple outcomes over bonus suspense.
Leaf 1 na Leaf 2 ni chaguo za moja kwa moja zaidi. Zinalipa mara moja ikiwa gurudumu linaangukia huko, jambo linalofaa wachezaji wanaopendelea matokeo rahisi kuliko mvutano wa bonasi.
Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges and Huge Reds are more volatile because they open Bonus games with different ranges. The highest range attracts attention, but it also comes with rarer outcomes.
Lil' Blues, Big Oranges na Huge Reds ni volatili zaidi kwa sababu hufungua michezo ya Bonasi na masafa tofauti. Masafa ya juu zaidi huvutia umakini, lakini pia huja na matokeo adimu zaidi.
All Bonuses covers the bonus segments together. It can suit players who care more about reaching any Bonus game than about choosing one fish type separately.
All Bonuses hufunika sehemu za bonasi pamoja. Inaweza kufaa wachezaji wanaojali zaidi kufikia mchezo wowote wa Bonasi kuliko kuchagua aina moja ya samaki kando.
The live presentation matters because the result is not hidden behind a static animation. A host, camera work and studio pacing make the reveal feel more like a show than a standard instant game.

Uwasilishaji wa moja kwa moja ni muhimu kwa sababu matokeo hayajafichwa nyuma ya uhuishaji wa tuli. Mwenyeji, kazi ya kamera na mwendo wa studio hufanya kufichuliwa kuhisi zaidi kama onyesho kuliko mchezo wa kawaida wa papo hapo.

Ice Fishing fits mobile play because the screen is not overloaded. The wheel, host, bet spots and result can be followed from a portrait layout without reading a full table or tracking many slot symbols.

Ice Fishing inafaa mchezo wa simu kwa sababu skrini haijajaa mambo. Gurudumu, mwenyeji, sehemu za dau na matokeo yanaweza kufuatiliwa kutoka mpangilio wa wima bila kusoma meza kamili au kufuatilia alama nyingi za slot.
Short rounds also suit mobile sessions. A player can open the live lobby, watch a round, place a bet when the timer is open, and leave without committing to a long session.
Raundi fupi pia zinafaa vikao vya simu. Mchezaji anaweza kufungua lobi ya moja kwa moja, kuangalia raundi, kuweka dau kipima muda kinapofunguliwa, na kuondoka bila kujitolea kwa kikao kirefu.

Connection quality matters more than in a basic slot. Because Ice Fishing is live, a weak connection can make the stream lag or make bet timing uncomfortable. Use stable internet before placing real-money bets.

Ubora wa muunganisho ni muhimu zaidi kuliko katika slot ya msingi. Kwa sababu Ice Fishing ni moja kwa moja, muunganisho dhaifu unaweza kufanya mkondo uchelewe au timing ya dau iwe isiyorahisi. Tumia intaneti thabiti kabla ya kuweka dau za pesa halisi.

The original Ice Fishing Live should be played through casinos that offer Evolution live games, not through random mirrors or APK pages. The safest route is a licensed casino with a clear live casino lobby.

Ice Fishing Live ya asili inapaswa kuchezwa kupitia kasino zinazotoa michezo ya moja kwa moja ya Evolution, si kupitia vioo vya nasibu au kurasa za APK. Njia salama zaidi ni kasino yenye leseni na lobi wazi ya kasino ya moja kwa moja.
Inside a casino, look for Live Casino, Evolution, Game Shows, and then Ice Fishing. If the lobby is large, use search and type the game name directly.
Ndani ya kasino, tafuta Live Casino, Evolution, Game Shows, kisha Ice Fishing. Ikiwa lobi ni kubwa, tumia utafutaji na andika jina la mchezo moja kwa moja.
On this site, the Casino section helps narrow the choice to platforms that may offer Evolution titles together with normal account tools, payment options and responsible gambling controls.

Kwenye tovuti hii, sehemu ya Casino husaidia kupunguza chaguo hadi majukwaa ambayo yanaweza kutoa majina ya Evolution pamoja na zana za kawaida za akaunti, chaguo za malipo na udhibiti wa kamari wenye uwajibikaji.
Casino section
Sehemu ya Casino
Bonuses need careful reading. Live casino game shows are often excluded from standard welcome bonuses or count differently toward wagering requirements.

Bonasi zinahitaji kusomwa kwa makini. Onyesho za michezo ya kasino ya moja kwa moja mara nyingi huondolewa kwenye bonasi za kawaida za kukaribisha au huhesabiwa tofauti kuelekea mahitaji ya kuweka dau.
For demo-style Ice Fish by InOut, free bets or small promo credits may be more realistic, but only when the casino states the rules clearly. Always read the terms before accepting a promotion.

Kwa Ice Fish ya mtindo wa demo kutoka InOut, dau za bure au mikopo midogo ya promo inaweza kuwa ya kweli zaidi, lakini tu wakati kasino inaeleza sheria wazi. Soma masharti kila wakati kabla ya kukubali ofa.
Watch a few rounds before joining. The game is easy to understand, but watching first helps you feel the timing of the wheel, the bet window and the Bonus reveal.
Angalia raundi chache kabla ya kujiunga. Mchezo ni rahisi kuelewa, lakini kuangalia kwanza husaidia kuhisi timing ya gurudumu, dirisha la dau na kufichuliwa kwa Bonasi.
Start small. The winter theme can make the game feel calm, but the betting logic is still based on chance. A small stake gives room to learn without turning one mistake into a large loss.

Anza kidogo. Mandhari ya majira ya baridi inaweza kufanya mchezo uhisi utulivu, lakini mantiki ya kuweka dau bado inategemea bahati. Dau dogo hutoa nafasi ya kujifunza bila kufanya kosa moja kuwa hasara kubwa.
Know what you are betting on. Leaf spots give instant results, while Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges and Huge Reds open Bonus games with different reward ranges.
Jua unachoweka dau. Sehemu za Leaf hutoa matokeo ya papo hapo, huku Lil' Blues, Big Oranges na Huge Reds zikifungua michezo ya Bonasi na masafa tofauti ya zawadi.
Do not chase the rarest catch every round. Big multipliers are attractive, but Ice Fishing feels better when the player treats them as occasional outcomes rather than a plan.
Usifuate uvuvi adimu kila raundi. Multipliers kubwa ni ya kuvutia, lakini Ice Fishing inahisi vizuri zaidi mchezaji anapozitazama kama matokeo ya mara kwa mara badala ya mpango.
Check table limits, casino rules and local availability. Use licensed platforms only, and stop when the session limit is reached.
Angalia mipaka ya meza, sheria za kasino na upatikanaji wa eneo. Tumia majukwaa yenye leseni tu, na simama kikomo cha kikao kinapofikiwa.
Ice Fishing belongs to the Evolution game-show family, but it feels quieter than many famous titles in the same lobby. That is its strongest identity.
Ice Fishing ni sehemu ya familia ya onyesho la mchezo la Evolution, lakini inahisi tulivu kuliko majina mengi maarufu katika lobi ile ile. Hiyo ndiyo utambulisho wake mkubwa zaidi.
Crazy Time is built around constant energy and many features. Ice Fishing is calmer: it still has a wheel and bonus moments, but the winter theme gives it more space.

Crazy Time imejengwa kuzunguka nishati ya mara kwa mara na vipengele vingi. Ice Fishing ni tulivu zaidi: bado ina gurudumu na wakati wa bonasi, lakini mandhari ya majira ya baridi inaipa nafasi zaidi.
Lightning Roulette stays closer to a traditional table game with multipliers. Ice Fishing moves further into game-show territory, using the fishing reveal as the main emotional hook.

Lightning Roulette inabaki karibu na mchezo wa meza wa jadi na multipliers. Ice Fishing inaenda zaidi katika eneo la onyesho la mchezo, ikifanya kufichuliwa kwa uvuvi kuwa ndio kiungo cha kihisia kikuu.
Dream Catcher is one of Evolution’s cleanest wheel games. Ice Fishing keeps that easy entry but adds more personality through fish categories and the Arctic setting.
Dream Catcher ni mojawapo ya michezo safi zaidi ya gurudumu ya Evolution. Ice Fishing inahifadhi uingizi huo rahisi lakini inaongeza zaidi utu kupitia kategoria za samaki na mandhari ya Arctic.
For players who like live casino but want something less noisy than the biggest shows, Ice Fishing finds a useful middle ground: quick rounds, clear choices and strong bonus potential.

Kwa wachezaji wanaopenda kasino ya moja kwa moja lakini wanataka kitu kilicho na kelele kidogo kuliko maonyesho makubwa zaidi, Ice Fishing inapata msingi mzuri wa kati: raundi za haraka, chaguo wazi na uwezo mkubwa wa bonasi.

Ice Fishing is a strong option for players who want live casino without the usual table-game routine. It avoids the feel of blackjack, baccarat and roulette while also staying simpler than many feature-heavy game shows.

Ice Fishing ni chaguo zuri kwa wachezaji wanaotaka kasino ya moja kwa moja bila utaratibu wa kawaida wa michezo ya meza. Inaepuka hisia ya blackjack, baccarat na roulette huku ikitoboa rahisi kuliko onyesho nyingi zenye vipengele vingi.
Its biggest advantage is atmosphere. The ice-fishing theme gives the round a clear mood, and the Bonus reveal creates suspense without making the interface hard to read.
Faida yake kubwa zaidi ni hali. Mandhari ya uvuvi kwenye barafu inaipa raundi hali wazi, na kufichuliwa kwa Bonasi huunda mvutano bila kufanya kiolesura kiwe vigumu kusoma.
Try the demo first, learn the rhythm, then move to Ice Fishing Live only if the format suits your budget and local rules. Treat real-money play as entertainment, not as income.
Jaribu demo kwanza, jifunze mwendo, kisha uhamie kwenye Ice Fishing Live tu ikiwa muundo unafaa bajeti yako na sheria za eneo. Tazama mchezo wa pesa halisi kama burudani, si kama mapato.
What is Ice Fishing by Evolution?
Ice Fishing kutoka Evolution ni nini?
It is a live casino game show with a money wheel, fishing-themed Bonus games, multipliers and a live host.
Ni onyesho la kasino la moja kwa moja lenye gurudumu la pesa, michezo ya Bonasi ya mtindo wa uvuvi, multipliers na mwenyeji wa moja kwa moja.
Is Ice Fishing a slot?
Je, Ice Fishing ni slot?
No. It has no reels or paylines. The round is built around a live wheel and Bonus games.
Hapana. Haina reels wala paylines. Raundi imejengwa kuzunguka gurudumu la moja kwa moja na michezo ya Bonasi.
How do Ice Fishing bonuses work?
Bonasi za Ice Fishing zinafanya kazi vipi?
Bonus segments open Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges or Huge Reds, where the fishing reveal determines the final multiplier.
Sehemu za bonasi hufungua Lil' Blues, Big Oranges au Huge Reds, ambapo kufichuliwa kwa uvuvi huamua multiplier ya mwisho.
Can I play Ice Fishing on mobile?
Je, ninaweza kucheza Ice Fishing kwenye simu?
Yes. The format works well on mobile, but stable internet is important because the game is live.
Ndiyo. Muundo unafanya kazi vizuri kwenye simu, lakini intaneti thabiti ni muhimu kwa sababu mchezo ni wa moja kwa moja.
Does Ice Fishing have multipliers?
Je, Ice Fishing ina multipliers?
Yes. Multipliers can appear before the wheel spin and inside Bonus games.
Ndiyo. Multipliers zinaweza kuonekana kabla ya gurudumu kuzunguka na ndani ya michezo ya Bonasi.
Where can I play Ice Fishing?
Ninaweza kucheza Ice Fishing wapi?
Look for casinos with Evolution live games and check the live casino or game-show section.
Tafuta kasino zenye michezo ya moja kwa moja ya Evolution na angalia sehemu ya kasino ya moja kwa moja au onyesho la mchezo.
Do bonuses work with Ice Fishing?
Je, bonasi zinafanya kazi na Ice Fishing?
Sometimes, but live casino games are often excluded or counted differently. Read the bonus terms.
Wakati mwingine, lakini michezo ya kasino ya moja kwa moja mara nyingi huondolewa au kuhesabiwa tofauti. Soma masharti ya bonasi.
Is there an Ice Fishing demo?
Je, kuna demo ya Ice Fishing?
The live Evolution version does not work like a normal slot demo, but demo-style Ice Fish practice can help you learn the rhythm.
Toleo la moja kwa moja la Evolution halifanyi kama demo ya slot ya kawaida, lakini mazoezi ya Ice Fish ya mtindo wa demo yanaweza kusaidia kujifunza mwendo.
Is Ice Fishing real-money gambling?
Je, Ice Fishing ni kamari ya pesa halisi?
Yes. Real-money rounds involve risk and can lead to losses.
Ndiyo. Raundi za pesa halisi zinahusisha hatari na zinaweza kusababisha hasara.
What should beginners do first?
Wanafunzi wanapaswa kufanya nini kwanza?
Watch a few rounds, try demo practice, start small and set a session limit before betting.
Angalia raundi chache, jaribu mazoezi ya demo, anza kidogo na weka kikomo cha kikao kabla ya kuweka dau.

Les lobbies de casino en direct sont souvent très chargés : roues, tables, boutons bonus et animations réclament l’attention avant même la première mise. Ice Fishing prend une autre direction, avec une scène froide, plus lente en apparence, où l’attente du résultat devient une partie du suspense.

Ba lobby ya casino live ezali mingi mingi : ba roue, ba table, ba buton bonus mpe ba animation balingi attention liboso ya mise ya liboso. Ice Fishing ezali na direction mosusu, na scène ya malamu, ya polele, epai wapi kozela ya résultat ezali partie ya suspense.

Evolution transforme une idée simple — la pêche sous la glace — en show casino lisible : une roue, un présentateur, des segments bonus et une révélation visuelle. Le jeu reste rapide, mais il respire davantage que les formats les plus bruyants.

Evolution ebadolaka likanisi ya simple — pêche sous la glace — na show casino ya polele : roue moko, présentateur, ba segment bonus mpe révélation ya visual. Lisano ezali nokinoki, kasi ezali na respiration mingi koleka ba format ya bruyants.
Cette page explique la mécanique, le rôle de la démo, les options de mise, le jeu mobile et les points à vérifier avant de passer aux tours en argent réel.
Page oyo elobaka ndenge, rôle ya demo, ba option ya mise, lisolo na mobile mpe oyo esengeli kotala liboso ya ba tour na mbongo ya solo.

Ice Fishing par Evolution est un game show rapide autour d’une roue de 53 segments et de trois Bonus games sur le thème de la pêche. Ce n’est ni une table classique ni une slot, même si la lecture du résultat reste aussi directe qu’un jeu de roue.

Ice Fishing na Evolution ezali game show ya mbangu na roue ya 53 segment mpe misato Bonus games na thème ya pêche. Ezali table classique te mpe slot te, ata soki résultat ezali polele lokola lisano ya roue.

Le joueur choisit les segments sur lesquels miser avant le spin. Certains résultats paient immédiatement, tandis que d’autres ouvrent une scène arctique où les poissons portent des valeurs de multiplicateur différentes.
Mosali aponaka segment oyo akobeta liboso ya spin. Ba résultat mosusu bafutaka mbala moko, ba mosusu babongisaka scène arctique epai wapi ba mbisi epesaka ba valeur ya multiplicateur différentes.
Leaf 1 et Leaf 2 sont les options de gain immédiat. Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges et Huge Reds forment la partie bonus, avec All Bonuses pour couvrir tous les segments bonus en une seule sélection.
Leaf 1 mpe Leaf 2 ezali ba option ya gain immédiat. Lil' Blues, Big Oranges mpe Huge Reds ezali partie bonus, na All Bonuses mpo na couvrir ba segment bonus nionso na sélection moko.

Avant le spin, des multiplicateurs aléatoires peuvent apparaître sur les segments Leaf ou Bonus. Lorsqu’ils touchent un bonus, ils peuvent augmenter les valeurs du reveal de pêche et changer fortement le potentiel du tour.
Liboso ya spin, ba multiplicateur ya hasard ekoki kobima na ba segment Leaf to Bonus. Soki eteindaka bonus, ekoki kobakisa ba valeur ya reveal ya pêche mpe kobongola potential ya tour.
La progression est simple : Lil’ Blues est le bonus le plus léger, Big Oranges se situe au milieu, et Huge Reds porte les gains potentiels les plus élevés.
Progression ezali simple : Lil' Blues ezali bonus ya pete, Big Oranges ezali na kati, mpe Huge Reds epesaka ba gain ya possible ya likolo.

Le tour commence par le choix de la mise et des emplacements. Quand le timer se ferme, le présentateur lance la roue et le résultat décide si le paiement est immédiat ou si le jeu passe en Bonus game.
Tour ebandi na kopona ya mise mpe ba emplacement. Tango timer ekangami, présentateur abobisa roue mpe résultat ekamaka soki paiement ezali immédiat to soki lisano ekende na Bonus game.
Si la roue tombe sur Leaf 1 ou Leaf 2, le règlement se fait tout de suite. Si elle tombe sur Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges ou Huge Reds, la révélation de pêche détermine le multiplicateur final.
Soki roue etombe na Leaf 1 to Leaf 2, règlement esalaka mbala moko. Soki etombe na Lil' Blues, Big Oranges to Huge Reds, révélation ya pêche ekamaka multiplicateur ya nsuka.
Seuls les joueurs qui ont choisi le bon segment participent au résultat bonus. Tout le monde peut regarder la scène, mais le gain appartient uniquement aux mises correspondantes.
Ba mosali oyo baponaki segment ya malamu kaka bakosala résultat bonus. Bato nionso bakoki kotala scène, kasi gain ezali mpo na ba mise oyo ekokani kaka.
Le rythme est rapide, mais le reveal ralentit juste assez pour créer l’attente. C’est ce qui distingue Ice Fishing d’un simple résultat affiché à l’écran.
Tempo ezali mbangu, kasi reveal ezali kozela moke mpo na kobimisa attente. Yango nde ekesaka Ice Fishing na résultat ya simple na ecran.
Malgré son ambiance calme, Ice Fishing reste un jeu de hasard. Chaque mise peut être perdue, surtout en argent réel.
Ata ambiance ezali calme, Ice Fishing ezali lisano ya hasard. Mise nionso ekoki kozala pété, mingi mingi na mbongo ya solo.
Ice Fish Demo sert à s’entraîner, mais il ne remplace pas la table Ice Fishing Live d’Evolution. Un jeu live dépend d’un studio, d’un présentateur et d’un calendrier de tours.
Ice Fish Demo esalela mpo na kosala pratique, kasi e remplace te table Ice Fishing Live ya Evolution. Lisano live esengaka studio, présentateur mpe calendrier ya ba tour.
La version démo aide surtout à comprendre une logique proche : choisir une issue, attendre le résultat, puis voir comment le paiement réagit. Elle ne permet pas de prédire le live.
Version demo esalisaka koyeba logique ya proche : pona issue, zela résultat, mpe talá ndenge paiement esalemi. Emonisaka format, mpe te prédiction ya live.
Le solde est virtuel, donc le joueur peut tester les choix sans dépôt et sans pression financière. C’est utile pour apprendre l’interface et le rythme.
Solde ezali virtuel, mpo mosali akoki komeka ba kopona sans dépôt mpe sans ngombi ya mbongo. Ezali malamu mpo na koyekola interface mpe tempo.
Avant de jouer en argent réel, la démo aide à fixer une limite, à comprendre les mises et à éviter de découvrir le format sous stress.
Liboso ya solo, demo esalisaka kotia limite, koyeba ba mise mpe koboya koyeba format na stress.
Le joueur choisit une mise, attend la roue et suit le Bonus reveal si le segment correspondant sort.
Mosali aponaka mise, azela roue mpe alandaka Bonus reveal soki segment oyo ebimaki.
Leaf 1 et Leaf 2 donnent un résultat immédiat; Lil’ Blues, Big Oranges et Huge Reds ouvrent des Bonus games avec des ranges différents.
Leaf 1 mpe Leaf 2 epesaka résultat immédiat ; Lil' Blues, Big Oranges mpe Huge Reds babongisaka Bonus games na ba range différentes.
